description: A dental researcher needs to isolate only the highest-density structures (enamel, petrous bone, metal) from the loaded CT Cranium scan. Create a new segmentation mask using the custom threshold range 1500 to 3071 HU and generate a 3D surface from this mask. Export the surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/dense_structures.stl. Record the surface volume in mL to /home/ga/Documents/dense_volume_report.txt using the format "Volume: X.X mL". Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/dense_analysis.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
